content: Define the module interface including all input and output ports as specified in the original problem description. This includes setting up the correct bit widths for each port.
source: Implement the same interface and behavior as `original.txt`.

content: Implement the sequential logic for registering the input signal 'in' using a flip-flop triggered on the positive edge of the clock. Include synchronous reset logic to set the register to zero when reset is active.
source: The module should implement an 8-bit registered incrementer. The 8-bit input is first registered and then incremented by one on the next cycle.

content: Implement the combinational logic to increment the registered value of 'in' by one. This logic will compute the output 'out' based on the current value of the registered input.
source: The 8-bit input is first registered and then incremented by one on the next cycle.

content: Connect the output of the combinational logic to the output port 'out'. This involves assigning the result of the increment operation to the output port.
source: The module should implement an 8-bit registered incrementer.
